Name: ONLINE_EVENT_PARAM
Description: Controls the state and configuration of online events, including multiplayer events and item distribution campaigns.

Fields.Name: New Moon Event Active
Fields.Description: Indicates whether the New Moon event is currently active.

Fields.Name: Multiplayer Event Active
Fields.Description: Indicates whether a multiplayer event is currently active.

Fields.Name: Item Distribution Chest Event Generation ID
Fields.Description: Generation ID used for item distribution treasure chest events.
